# Third-party action pin manifest — release-related workflows only
#
# Every action used by release.yml, release-drafter-draft.yml,
# release-drafter-autolabel.yml, and pr-title-lint.yml is pinned to a
# full commit SHA. This file records the human-readable tag for each
# pinned SHA so reviewers can verify pins without leaving the repo.
#
# To bump a pin:
#   1. Look up the desired release on GitHub.
#   2. Resolve the tag → commit SHA via
#      `gh api /repos/<owner>/<repo>/git/ref/tags/<tag> --jq .object.sha`
#   3. Update both the workflow YAML AND this file.
#   4. Open a PR labeled `deps`.
#
# Scope: release-related workflows only. Pre-existing ci.yml hardening
# is a follow-up TODO and NOT covered by this manifest.

actions/checkout
  pinned_sha:     de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd
  pinned_tag:     v6.0.2
  used_in:        release.yml

actions/setup-dotnet
  pinned_sha:     c2fa09f4bde5ebb9d1777cf28262a3eb3db3ced7
  pinned_tag:     v5.2.0
  used_in:        release.yml

actions/attest-build-provenance
  pinned_sha:     a2bbfa25375fe432b6a289bc6b6cd05ecd0c4c32
  pinned_tag:     v4.1.0
  used_in:        release.yml
  notes:          Requires id-token:write + attestations:write permissions.

release-drafter/release-drafter
  pinned_sha:     da8b9b696abad2ad997580e49f4c1c2e03cc2bd2
  pinned_tag:     v7.3.0
  used_in:        release-drafter-draft.yml (root action)
                  release-drafter-autolabel.yml (autolabeler subpath)
  source_citation: |
    The autolabeler reads `pull_request.title` and `pull_request.body`
    from the event payload and does not filter by github.event.action,
    so it accepts `opened, reopened, synchronize, edited` events
    uniformly. See:
      https://github.com/release-drafter/release-drafter/blob/da8b9b696abad2ad997580e49f4c1c2e03cc2bd2/lib/labeler.js
    (search for `pull_request.title` to confirm the unfiltered title-
    based matching). This citation is the auditable proof per the
    PLAN-RELEASE-WORKFLOW.md "v11 changes" entry.
